name: Citrus
description: Halved oranges, grapefruits and limes pressed cut-side down on the counter — every redraw rolls new fruit with the pith ring intact.

code.style: --flesh: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --spin: @rand(360deg); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: @rand(10%, 20%); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--flesh); border: calc(50px / @Y) solid rgba(255, 250, 238, 0.85); box-shadow: 0 0 0 calc(14px / @Y) rgba(60, 40, 10, 0.14); box-sizing: border-box; transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 46%; top: 32%; width: 8%; height: 13%; border-radius: 50% 50% 50% 0; background: var(--color0); transform: rotate(@rand(360deg)); transform-origin: 50% 140%; transition: ease 700ms; } } transition: ease 700ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
